# TypeScript Project Setup

## Workspace Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - TypeScript Hello World project
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project (skipped for Hello World)
- [x] Install Required Extensions (not needed)
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Project Information

This is a TypeScript project initialized with basic configuration. The project includes:
- TypeScript compiler configured with strict mode
- Source files in `src/` directory
- Compiled output in `dist/` directory
- Build, start, and dev scripts configured in package.json
- README.md with project documentation
